props.name: accept
props.description: Accepted file types as a comma-separated list of MIME types or file extensions (e.g., "image/*,.pdf").

props.name: maxFileSize
props.description: Maximum file size with unit (e.g., "5MB", "100KB", "1GB"). Files exceeding this will be rejected.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: The input display variant. "dragdrop" shows a drag-and-drop area, "button" shows a simple button.

events.name: onSelectFile
events.description: Callback fired when a valid file is selected or dropped.

props.name: accept
props.description: Accepted file types as a comma-separated list of MIME types or file extensions (e.g., "image/*,.pdf").

props.name: id
props.description: Sets the id attribute on the file upload input element.

props.name: maxFileSize
props.description: Maximum file size with unit (e.g., "5MB", "100KB", "1GB"). Files exceeding this will be rejected.

props.name: mb
props.description: Sets the bottom margin spacing token.

props.name: ml
props.description: Sets the left margin spacing token.

props.name: mr
props.description: Sets the right margin spacing token.

props.name: mt
props.description: Sets the top margin spacing token.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets the data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: variant
props.description: The input display variant. "dragdrop" shows a drag-and-drop area, "button" shows a simple button.

events.name: onSelectFile
events.description: Emits when a file is selected. Emits the selected file details.

props.name: accept
props.description: Accepted file types as a comma-separated list of MIME types or file extensions (e.g., "image/*,.pdf").

props.name: maxfilesize
props.description: Maximum file size with unit (e.g., "5MB", "100KB", "1GB"). Defaults to 5MB. Files exceeding this will be rejected.

props.name: testid
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.
